title: Petco Health and Wellness Company Stock Price & Overview
text: Petco Health and Wellness Company Stock Analysis. Business Overview: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. is a specialty retailer of pet supplies, services, and food. The company operates pet supply stores and provides veterinary and grooming services. Recent Performance: The company has demonstrated significant improvement in profitability metrics in 2025 with adjusted EBITDA up 21.3% and successful free cash flow generation of $187 million. Revenue Trends: Net sales declined 2.5% in 2025 to $6.0 billion, continuing the challenge of top-line growth in recent years. Gross margin has been a bright spot with continued expansion from operational improvements. Key Metrics: Gross margin: 38.7%. Adjusted EBITDA: $408.2 million. Free cash flow: $187.0 million. Pet Services Growth: The integrated vet, grooming, and training services business continues to show strong growth momentum with over 300 veterinary hospitals. Stock Overview: At current price around $2.77, the stock trades below analyst price targets and provides a potential value opportunity for investors bullish on the company's services growth strategy.
